PABELICO NON-OPPOSITION TO PLAINTIFF"S MOTION TO APPROVE $5,000 IN PENALTIES AS PART OF SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PURSUANT TO THE PRIVATE ATTORNEY GENERAL ACT (TRANSACTION ID # 17088042) FILED BY DEFENDANT PABELICO, PAUL S. AN INDIVIDUAL IMPERIAL PARKING (U.S.) LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF RICKY SANTOS' MOTION TO APPROVE 5,000 IN PENALTIES AS PART OF A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PURSUANT TO THE PRIVATE ATTORNEY GENERAL ACT IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 26, 2017, AT 9:30 A.M., IN DEPT. 302. FURTHER EVIDENCE TO BE FILED BY APRIL 21, 2017 ON THE ISSUE REGARDING PAGE 4 OF MR. SANTOS' MEMORANDUM STATING THAT "THE PARTIES HAVE AGREED THAT $5,000 IN PENALTIES IS A FAIR AND REASONABLE SUM TO RESOLVE PLAINTIFF'S PAGA CLAIMS." NO EXPLANATION IS PROVIDED WHY THIS AMOUNT IS FAIR AND REASONABLE, ESPECIALLY GIVEN THE SETTLEMENT AMOUNT PAID TO MR. SANTOS. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR #8189 =(302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve 5,000 In Penalties As Part Of A Settlement Agreement Pursuant To The Private Attorney General Act
Off Calendar Apr-26-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DENNIS C. BIRKHIMER, TEL. NO. 1-415-257-4700 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JON C. YONEMITSU OF THE GORDON & REES, LLP, TEL. NO. 1-619-696-6700 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEAANCE.

RULING - The matter was discussed regarding giving up claims for people who have not received any benefits. Counsel was able to convince the court and explained that pursuant to the settlement agreement $5,000.00 of the full sum would be sent to the LAWDA for purposes of sending out to the aggrieved employees. The court ruled as follows: PLAINTIFF RICKY SANTOS' Motion To Approve 5,000 In Penalties As Part Of A Settlement Agreement Pursuant To The Private Attorney General Act is Granted. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =(302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve 5,000 In Penalties As Part Of A Settlement Agreement Pursuant To The Private Attorney General Act
Off Calendar Apr-17-2017 Continued To Apr-26-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DENNIS C. BIRKHIMER, TEL. NO. 1-415-257-4700 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JON C. YONEMITSU OF GORDON & REES, LLP, TEL. NO. 1-619-696-6700 APPEARING FO THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. PLAINTIFF RICKY SANTOS' Motion To Approve 5,000 In Penalties As Part Of A Settlement Agreement Pursuant To The Private Attorney General Act is continued to April 26, 2017. Further evidence to be filed by April 21, 2017 on the issue regarding Page 4 of Mr. Santos' memorandum stating that "The parties have agreed that $5,000 in penalties is a fair and reasonable sum to resolve Plaintiff's PAGA claims." No explanation is provided why this amount is fair and reasonable, especially given the settlement amount paid to Mr. Santos. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =(302/HK)
